question_text: Which of the following is an example of kinetic energy?

options.label: A
options.text: A ball rolling down a hill

options.label: C
options.text: A book sitting on a shelf

explanation: Kinetic energy is the energy of movement. A ball rolling down a hill is moving, so it has kinetic energy. A stretched spring has elastic potential energy, a book on a shelf has gravitational potential energy, and heat from a fire is thermal energy.
